arg.name: robot_model
arg.description: Robot model to bring up. Choices are: [allie, cornelius, joe].

arg.name: runtime_config_package
arg.description: Package with the controller configuration in the config folder.

arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with shared robot URDF/xacro files.

arg.name: controllers_file
arg.description: Optional YAML file (without extension) with the controller configuration override.

arg.name: prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setups.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Start the selected robot with mock hardware mirroring commands into states.

arg.name: mock_sensor_commands
arg.description: Enable mock command interfaces for sensors used for simple simulations.

arg.name: robot_controller
arg.description: Robot controller to start. Choices are: [diff_drive_controller].

arg.name: rviz
arg.description: Launch RViz alongside the selected robot bringup.

arg.name: pwm_device_path
arg.description: Serial device used by the Maestro PWM controller.

arg.name: pwm_channel_fl
arg.description: Maestro channel used for the front-left wheel motor.

arg.name: pwm_channel_fr
arg.description: Maestro channel used for the front-right wheel motor.

arg.name: pwm_channel_rl
arg.description: Maestro channel used for the rear-left wheel motor.

arg.name: pwm_channel_rr
arg.description: Maestro channel used for the rear-right wheel motor.

arg.name: pwm_min
arg.description: Minimum RC PWM command in microseconds.

arg.name: pwm_neutral
arg.description: Neutral RC PWM command in microseconds.

arg.name: pwm_max
arg.description: Maximum RC PWM command in microseconds.

arg.name: pwm_wheel_radius
arg.description: Wheel radius used to convert joint velocity commands into wheel surface speed.

arg.name: pwm_max_wheel_speed
arg.description: Wheel speed that maps to full-scale PWM.

arg.name: pwm_invert_left
arg.description: Invert the left PWM output sign.

arg.name: pwm_invert_right
arg.description: Invert the right PWM output sign.

arg.name: python_executable
arg.description: Python executable used by the robot backend helper processes.

arg.name: roboclaw_use_encoder
arg.description: Use Roboclaw encoder feedback for Cornelius hardware bringup.

arg.name: roboclaw_device
arg.description: Serial device used by the Roboclaw controller.

arg.name: roboclaw_baud
arg.description: Serial baud rate used by the Roboclaw controller.

arg.name: roboclaw_address
arg.description: Packet serial address used by the Roboclaw controller.

arg.name: roboclaw_max_speed
arg.description: Maximum track speed in m/s used for command saturation.

arg.name: roboclaw_ticks_at_max_speed
arg.description: Full-scale duty command used by the Roboclaw no-encoder mode.

arg.name: roboclaw_acceleration
arg.description: Acceleration value used for Roboclaw duty commands.

arg.name: roboclaw_ticks_per_meter
arg.description: Encoder ticks per meter for the Roboclaw encoder mode.

arg.name: roboclaw_m1_invert
arg.description: Invert the Roboclaw M1 motor direction in software.

arg.name: roboclaw_m2_invert
arg.description: Invert the Roboclaw M2 motor direction in software.

arg.name: roboclaw_m1_encoder_sign
arg.description: Sign correction applied to the Roboclaw M1 encoder ticks.

arg.name: roboclaw_m2_encoder_sign
arg.description: Sign correction applied to the Roboclaw M2 encoder ticks.

arg.name: roboclaw_wheel_radius
arg.description: Track drive wheel radius used to convert Cornelius joint velocity commands.

arg.name: odrive_front_serial_number
arg.description: USB serial number of the front ODrive v3.6 board.

arg.name: odrive_rear_serial_number
arg.description: USB serial number of the rear ODrive v3.6 board.

arg.name: odrive_front_right_axis
arg.description: Axis index on the front ODrive that corresponds to the right wheel motor.

arg.name: odrive_rear_right_axis
arg.description: Axis index on the rear ODrive that corresponds to the right wheel motor.

arg.name: odrive_connect_timeout
arg.description: Timeout in seconds used when connecting to the front and rear ODrive boards.

let.name: selected_urdf_file
let.value: $(eval '\'allie.urdf.xacro\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius.urdf.xacro\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe.urdf.xacro\'')

let.name: selected_controllers_file
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var controllers_file)\' if \'$(var controllers_file)\' != \'\' else \'allie_controllers\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius_encoder_controllers\' if (\'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' and \'$(var use_mock_hardware)\' == \'false\' and \'$(var roboclaw_use_encoder)\' == \'true\') else \'cornelius_controllers\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe_controllers\'')

let.name: robot_description_content
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share $(var description_package))/urdf/$(var selected_urdf_file) prefix:=$(var prefix) use_mock_hardware:=$(var use_mock_hardware) mock_sensor_commands:=$(var mock_sensor_commands) attach_world:=false device_path:=$(var pwm_device_path) channel_fl:=$(var pwm_channel_fl) channel_fr:=$(var pwm_channel_fr) channel_rl:=$(var pwm_channel_rl) channel_rr:=$(var pwm_channel_rr) pwm_min:=$(var pwm_min) pwm_neutral:=$(var pwm_neutral) pwm_max:=$(var pwm_max) wheel_radius:=$(var pwm_wheel_radius) max_wheel_speed_mps:=$(var pwm_max_wheel_speed) invert_left:=$(var pwm_invert_left) invert_right:=$(var pwm_invert_right) python_executable:=$(var python_executable) roboclaw_device:=$(var roboclaw_device) roboclaw_baud:=$(var roboclaw_baud) roboclaw_address:=$(var roboclaw_address) roboclaw_use_encoder:=$(var roboclaw_use_encoder) roboclaw_max_speed:=$(var roboclaw_max_speed) roboclaw_ticks_at_max_speed:=$(var roboclaw_ticks_at_max_speed) roboclaw_acceleration:=$(var roboclaw_acceleration) roboclaw_ticks_per_meter:=$(var roboclaw_ticks_per_meter) roboclaw_m1_invert:=$(var roboclaw_m1_invert) roboclaw_m2_invert:=$(var roboclaw_m2_invert) roboclaw_m1_encoder_sign:=$(var roboclaw_m1_encoder_sign) roboclaw_m2_encoder_sign:=$(var roboclaw_m2_encoder_sign) roboclaw_wheel_radius:=$(var roboclaw_wheel_radius) front_serial_number:=$(var odrive_front_serial_number) rear_serial_number:=$(var odrive_rear_serial_number) front_right_axis:=$(var odrive_front_right_axis) rear_right_axis:=$(var odrive_rear_right_axis) connect_timeout:=$(var odrive_connect_timeout)')
